goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should be in the 'north' and should have 'a star of 4'.
Make sure you get 'price range'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'swimmingpool' and should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'entrance fee'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'attraction' by '02:15'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the north and should have a star of 4
Make sure you get price range
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of swimmingpool and should be in the same area as the hotel
Make sure you get phone number and entrance fee
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the attraction by 02:15
Make sure you get contact number and car type
